findings.description: Section s1 merges three source headings without splitting: the top-level 'ボタン又はリンクによるサブミット' (h1 with --- overline) plus its two h2 subsections 'サブミット先の指定方法' (====) and 'アプリケーションでonclick属性を指定する場合' (===). The combined content substantially exceeds 2000 characters. Per V3 rule, when an h2 section has >= 2000 chars and h3-equivalent subsections exist, splitting should be reported.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings: 'ボタン又はリンクによるサブミット' (--- overline), 'サブミット先の指定方法' (====), 'アプリケーションでonclick属性を指定する場合' (===) — all merged into s1.

findings.description: Section s3 is missing PascalCase class names and exception names present in the section content. Specifically missing: 'ApplicationException' (XxxException name from source code), 'ValidationContext' (PascalCase class used in Action example), 'SqlResultSet' (Nablarch-specific PascalCase class used in Action example).
findings.source_evidence: Source s3 Action class contains: 'ValidationContext<W11AC01SearchForm> formCtx = ...', 'throw new ApplicationException(formCtx.getMessages())', 'SqlResultSet searchResult = component.selectByCondition(...)'
